CommunityApplications.Profile: junkerderprovinz Unraid templates — Community Applications templates for all of junkerderprovinz's containers: own-image apps (Krusader, JDownloader, Matrix, featherdrop) and upstream-image wrappers (OpenHands, Standard Notes Server + LocalStack, Standard Notes Web UI, n8n). Each app folder has its own template, icon and README; the images and full source live in their per-app repositories. Maintained by junkerderprovinz; support via the per-app Unraid forum threads.
